forgotpassword.success: Your Update Password Email is on its way!

confirm.message: Are you sure you want to log out?
confirm.title: Log Out

prompt.guidelines: Password must contain at least 1 uppercase letter, at least 1 number, and have a minimum of 8 characters.

auth.message: Let’s get you logged in, or create a new Criterion Account!
auth.title: Tell us about yourself.

contribution.message:
Your support allows us to make our work relevant and accessible to all while actively contributing to building an American theatre that thrives on diversity.

We look forward to seeing you at the theatre soon!

finished-order.header:
Your tickets are confirmed! They will be available in your ticket wallet.
If you have any questions or concerns, please contact Audience Services at 212.719.1300.
finished-order.mail-sent-to: Your confirmation has been sent to the following e-mail address:
finished-order.more-info: Please check your confirmation email or My Orders page for more purchase information.

error.ACCESS_DENIED: Sorry, your transaction cannot be completed. For further assistance please contact Audience Services at audienceservices@criterionticketing.com or 833-CRI-TIXS (833-274-8497).
error.UNAUTHORIZED: Sorry, your transaction cannot be completed. For further assistance please contact Audience Services at audienceservices@criterionticketing.com or 833-CRI-TIXS (833-274-8497).

slide1.text1: Hiptix is Roundabout’s low-price ticket program for theatregoers 18-40. It´s free to join, and gets you access to $30* tickets to all Roundabout shows, plus invites to great parties.
slide1.title: What is Hiptix?

slide2.text1: Instant access to a selection of Broadway and Off-Broadway productions.
slide2.title: Broadway & Off-Broadway.

slide3.text1: There's no such thing as a bad seat, but there are better ones. Pick your seat and enjoy the show.
slide3.title: Choose your seats.

slide4.text1: Exclusive access to enter the Lottery for select productions.
slide4.title: Lottery Tickets

slide5.text1: No more digging through your pockets; keep all of your tickets in one place.
slide5.title: Manage your tickets.

order-no-item.title: Don't see your tickets? Tickets purchased on the phone or at the box office will not populate in the app- please contact audience services by emailing hiptix@roundabouttheatre.org or call 212.719.1300 with any questions.

legal.foreign-charge: Please note, the Criterion app is made in partnership with an Austrian company and your order will be charged from Ticket Gretchen Wien Aut / ROUNDABOUT THEATRE COMPANY you will not be charged any additional fees.

default.description: Book tickets at the regular price without a specific membership.
default.title: Regular tickets

quotas.description: Choose whether you want to book a full-price ticket or a reduced-price ticket as a member of our low-price ticket program for theatregoers 18-40.
quotas.title: Buy tickets

subtitle.self: We're really proud of our low-price ticket program for theatre lovers aged 18–40, and we're happy you want to be a part of it.

ACTIVE.text:
By joining Hiptix, you get access to purchase two $30 tickets to select Roundabout productions.

Hiptix tickets go fast, so please make sure to book your tickets in advance. And don't forget to bring a valid ID to the box office window when you pick up your tickets.

Great news. Now that you have an account, you can buy tickets directly through this app. Just navigate to the home page, select a production, and select your preferred date and time.

Questions?
Email hiptix@roundabouttheatre.org or call 212.719.1300.
ACTIVE.title: Thanks for joining Hiptix!

push.description: By deactivating you renounce the following services: You will receive notifications in time for pre-sale start, Lottery entry status, special offers, performance notifications and reminders for expiring events. These settings are unique to each of your devices.

text.push: You will receive notifications in time for presales & exclusive offers, lottery reminders & results and updates regarding your performance. This setting is unique to each of your devices.
